title: Drift Inventory Input
description: Canonical input format for scripts/ops/drift-inventory.mjs. Captures observed SharePoint fields per list. Consumed by the inventory script to produce CSV/MD reports comparing expected (SSOT) vs actual.

generatedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the snapshot was captured.

source.description: Origin of the snapshot. 'log-adapter' = derived from [sp:schema_mismatch] logs (partial coverage). 'live-probe' = direct SharePoint /fields read (full coverage). 'manual' = hand-authored fixture.

coverage.description: 'full' = actualFields per list is authoritative (enables zombie_candidate detection). 'partial' = only observed drift signals; absence of a field in actualFields does NOT imply it is missing.

notes.description: Free-text caveats about how this snapshot was generated.

listTitle.description: SharePoint list title as it appears in the tenant (post-envOr resolution).

listKey.description: Optional SP_LIST_REGISTRY key. If omitted, the script resolves via listTitle.

actualFields.description: Internal names observed on the SharePoint list. Authoritative only when coverage=full.

missingReports.description: Internal names that the application attempted to use but were not found. Signals drift even under partial coverage.
